title: onagraceae
intro: The Onagraceae rank is a family of flowering plants. Onagraceae is a family of plants commonly known as the willowherb or evening primrose family, consisting of approximately 600 species in about 20 genera. This family is characterized by its showy, often fragrant flowers and its unique reproductive structures. The Onagraceae family is found in temperate and subtropical regions around the world, with many species being native to North America.
